entity.summary: Hybrid crypto trading exchange combining off-chain order matching with on-chain settlement and margin management, supporting spot and perpetual markets, APIs, market data, and wallet-based or API-key authentication.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Grvt as a hybrid exchange combining off-chain matching with on-chain settlement and margin management. Current help and API documentation cover spot trading, perpetual markets, order types, market data, trading APIs, WebSocket feeds, and CCXT integration.

evidence.title: What is Grvt's hybrid exchange model?
evidence.notes: First-party documentation explains Grvt's hybrid architecture, including off-chain order matching, on-chain settlement and margin management, zk-proof-based privacy, and segregated custody controls.

evidence.title: Spot Trading on Grvt
evidence.notes: Current first-party help documentation describes active spot trading, direct asset ownership, immediate settlement, market and limit orders, and related order types.

evidence.title: Grvt API Documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party API documentation exposes market-data, WebSocket, and trading APIs and documents exchange authentication and CCXT integration.
